manualTodo: EN: Reinstall and sign in to sync the vault.
TR: Kasayi senkronlamak icin yeniden kurup giris yapin.

uiWarning.en: The local Bitwarden vault cache, device keys, tokens, and session data are not treated as portable. WCK records reinstall/sign-in guidance only.
uiWarning.tr: Yerel Bitwarden kasa onbellegi, cihaz anahtarlari, tokenlar ve oturum verisi tasinabilir sayilmaz. WCK yalnizca yeniden kurulum/giris yonlendirmesi kaydeder.

manualTodo: EN: Confirm vault sync and emergency access before formatting; export only if your security policy permits.
TR: Format oncesi kasa senkronunu ve acil erisimi dogrulayin; yalnizca guvenlik politikaniz izin veriyorsa disari aktarin.
